title: Dataset for the project: Glymphatic system of the human spinal canal - identification of circulation and outflow pathways of the cerebrospinal fluid
author: Rzepliński, Radosław
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Dataset for the project: Glymphatic system of the human spinal canal - identification of circulation and outflow pathways of the cerebrospinal fluid The study was funded by the National Science Centre, Poland (no. 2024/08/X/NZ4/00910, recipient Radosław Rzepliński) For the study protocol please see the article: Injecting nerves with radiological contrast as a novel method of studying the peripheral nervous system, https://doi.org/10.1111/joa.70033
steps_raw: Dataset for the project: Glymphatic system of the human spinal canal - identification of circulation and outflow pathways of the cerebrospinal fluid The study was funded by the National Science Centre, Poland (no. 2024/08/X/NZ4/00910, recipient Radosław Rzepliński) For the study protocol please see the article: Injecting nerves with radiological contrast as a novel method of studying the peripheral nervous system, https://doi.org/10.1111/joa.70033
